detail.description: Eloy Jiménez grounds out, shortstop Trevor Story to first baseman Willson Contreras.
Eloy Jiménez lines out to center fielder Jarren Duran.
Eloy Jiménez pops out to third baseman Caleb Durbin in foul territory.
Eloy Jiménez grounds out, third baseman José Ramírez to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
Eloy Jiménez grounds out, second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.

Eloy Jiménez grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Andrés Giménez out at 2nd. Eloy Jiménez out at 1st.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Davis Schneider scores.
Eloy Jiménez out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Bryce Teodosio. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.
Eloy Jiménez lines out sharply to left fielder Bryce Teodosio.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a fly ball to center fielder Mike Trout. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.
Eloy Jiménez lines out to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.
Eloy Jiménez grounds out, third baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman James McCann.
Eloy Jiménez pops out to second baseman Ketel Marte.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Alek Thomas. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Jesús Sánchez to 2nd.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Nolan Arenado.
Eloy Jiménez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.
Eloy Jiménez flies out to center fielder Alek Thomas.
Eloy Jiménez grounds out to pitcher Angel Zerpa. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.
Eloy Jiménez grounds out to first baseman Jake Bauers.
Eloy Jiménez flies out to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Eloy Jiménez flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.
